name: Reproducibility infrastructure
how_it_solves: Repo crispro-backend-v2 + Synthetic-Lethality (public on GitHub). Canonical artifact provenance documented at e.g., 'github.com/fjkiani/crispro@d33f640:publications/00-mbd4-manuscript/mbd4_parp_response/artifacts/canonical_atr_wee1_rerun_20260405/canonical_atr_wee1_rerun.json'. Test coverage 10 unit tests at tests/synthetic_lethality/v3/multimodal/test_mbd4_atr_promotion.py at HEAD bfd6d11f.
why_it_exists: Encoded gap between CrisPRO methodology and Bev2026.

attributes.moat_status: CrisPRO ADVANTAGE on code/artifact transparency. Bev2026's data deposition is strong; code withhold is a published limitation.
attributes.verification_status: Bev2026 Code Availability verbatim from PDF page 15. CrisPRO repo content from user-provided audit report transcript line 12288 + earlier worker-mounted verification.

raw_dimension_record.Bev2026_approach: Raw drug-screen data deposited to Zenodo 10.5281/zenodo.18957959. Code statement (verbatim): 'The underlying code for this study to pre-process drug screening image data is not publicly available but may be made available to qualified researchers on reasonable request from the corresponding authors.'
raw_dimension_record.Bev2026_score: DATA SHARED, CODE WITHHELD. Partial reproducibility.
raw_dimension_record.CrisPRO_approach: Repo crispro-backend-v2 + Synthetic-Lethality (public on GitHub). Canonical artifact provenance documented at e.g., 'github.com/fjkiani/crispro@d33f640:publications/00-mbd4-manuscript/mbd4_parp_response/artifacts/canonical_atr_wee1_rerun_20260405/canonical_atr_wee1_rerun.json'. Test coverage 10 unit tests at tests/synthetic_lethality/v3/multimodal/test_mbd4_atr_promotion.py at HEAD bfd6d11f.
raw_dimension_record.CrisPRO_score: OPEN CODE + CANONICAL ARTIFACT PROVENANCE. Higher reproducibility surface.
raw_dimension_record.moat_status: CrisPRO ADVANTAGE on code/artifact transparency. Bev2026's data deposition is strong; code withhold is a published limitation.
raw_dimension_record.verification_status: Bev2026 Code Availability verbatim from PDF page 15. CrisPRO repo content from user-provided audit report transcript line 12288 + earlier worker-mounted verification.
